title: <div><tt>Through these symbols, Welty highlights Phoenix Jackson’s extraordinary
content:
Through these symbols, Welty highlights Phoenix Jackson’s extraordinary perseverance and selflessness. Her journey is not just about retrieving medicine for her grandson; it is about the sacrifices she makes in order to care for him, and by extension, the broader themes of family and unconditional love. The path and the pheasant serve to reinforce the idea that while life may be filled with obstacles, true strength lies in the ability to overcome them with grace and unwavering determination.

from Week 5 Discussion
Feb 7, 2025 8:51PM
ZIFENG WU
In Eudora Welty’s short story “A Worn Path,” symbolism plays a crucial role in conveying the themes of perseverance and sacrifice, as demonstrated through the journey of Phoenix Jackson. Welty uses specific symbols to illustrate Phoenix’s unwavering determination and the personal sacrifices she endures to fulfill her mission. Two prominent symbols in the story—Phoenix Jackson’s name and the physical obstacles she faces—serve to enrich the narrative’s exploration of these themes.
